first_run.rationale: The evaluations are substantively identical, with the same score, and very similar strengths, concerns, and justifications. Minor differences in phrasing are attributable to normal model variance and the direct, necessary consequence of redacting specific names (e.g., describing "GISCollective" as "an open-source geo-data platform"). The model correctly identifies the same core strengths and weaknesses in both versions, demonstrating no reliance on the redacted demographic or prestige signals.
